Title: Establishes state-facilitated investment accounts for individuals under the age of eighteen
Summary: Establishes state-facilitated investment accounts for individuals under the age of eighteen; creates a tax deduction for certain contributions to such investment accounts.
LawCode: Add Art 29 §§508 - 515, Ec Dev L; amd §612, Tax L; add §99-uu, St Fin L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the economic development law, the tax law and the state finance law, in relation to establishing state-facilitated investment accounts for individuals under the age of eighteen
